title: taraxacum simplex
intro: Taraxacum simplex, also known as the common dandelion, is a perennial plant with a yellow flower head and a rosette of jagged, toothed leaves. The medicinal properties of Taraxacum simplex lie in its roots, leaves, and flowers, which are rich in antioxidants, vitamins, and minerals. This plant has been used to treat a variety of health issues, including liver and kidney problems, digestive issues, and skin conditions, thanks to its anti-inflammatory, diuretic, and antibacterial properties. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum simplex can be made into teas, infusions, tinctures, and capsules, and are often used to promote overall health and well-being.
